Appendix N: Transfer Credit Policy Maryland Higher Education Commission

(Title 13B)

Administrative History

Effective date: December 4, 1995 (22:24 Md. R. 1901) Regulations .02, .03, and .05 amended. Effective date: July 1, 1996 (23:13 Md. R. 946)

Regulations .02 and .06 amended August 2022 Authority: Education Article, 11-201 - 11-206, Annotated Code of Maryland

The full policy can be found at: https://dsd.maryland.gov/regulations/ Pages/13B.06.02.03.aspx.
